title: Change theme to black and red

requirements.summary: Update the color scheme throughout the application from the current dark gaming aesthetic to a black and red theme
acceptanceCriteria: All backgrounds use black or near-black colors
Primary accent colors use red tones
Text maintains sufficient contrast against black backgrounds
The black and red theme is consistently applied across all screens (passkey, device name, popup)
Interactive elements (buttons, inputs, borders) use the red accent color appropriately

file_operations.description: Update CSS custom properties to implement black and red theme. Change background colors to black or near-black (OKLCH values with L ~0-0.1), set primary/accent colors to red tones (OKLCH with H ~30 for red hue), update foreground text colors to ensure sufficient contrast against black backgrounds, modify card/popover/muted colors to use dark grays with red undertones, and adjust border colors to use red accents. Maintain OKLCH color space format for consistency.

Verify that Tailwind configuration correctly maps the updated CSS custom properties from index.css to utility classes. Ensure the color mappings in the theme.extend.colors section reference the modified CSS variables and that the black and red theme propagates through all Tailwind utilities used in components.
